summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ATC Master Platform iteration 4 - UI/UX redesign with Swiss/High-Contrast enterprise aesthetic. All 34 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly with the new design system.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI flows working with new design)

seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used: 1 staff (Daniel Hayward with 7 compliance documents), 1 client (Shaun Case with 4 goals), 5 CRM leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX redesign tested and verified. New enterprise design system with Swiss/High-Contrast aesthetic working correctly. All CSS classes (atc-card, atc-btn-primary, atc-table, atc-badge, atc-input, atc-label, atc-alert-*) rendering properly. Dark navy sidebar (#0A1628) with teal accent (#14B8B6) working. All data-testid attributes present and functional.
